input:
INTERNAL — DO NOT FORWARD
Property: townhouse, Benahavís village, 3 bed / 2 bath, terrace, parking.
Owner: Anneke D., Dutch national, retired.
Husband passed away six months ago; she is relocating to Netherlands
to be near her children. Emotionally ready to accept a fair offer and
move quickly — she finds the property too big to maintain alone.
Price dropped twice already: started at €625,000, now at €549,000.
We have been told informally she will accept €510,000 if the buyer
covers notary costs.
Terrace pergola built without planning permission — she is aware.
No structural issues otherwise.
Categories: C1 (nationality), C3 (accepted floor price, notary), C4 (unpermitted structure), C5 (bereavement, family situation), C8 (timeline driven by personal loss)
output:
TAGS: [Benahavís village location] [Private terrace] [Priced for quick sale] [Below comparable sales] [Terrace: verify permits]

DESCRIPTION: This three-bedroom townhouse in Benahavís village features a spacious terrace and dedicated parking. The property is perfect for those looking to enjoy the convenience of village life with minimal upkeep. An excellent opportunity for a swift acquisition is currently available.
